/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/DAWT/CONTD TO SET OR DISPO/CONTD:(FURTHER STATUS) TOSET TRIAL OR DISPO/X:DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE IS WAIVED IF IT IS TO SET TRIAL, THE COURT  ORDERS DEFENDANT PRESENT THROUGH COUNSEL IF THERE IS A DISPO,

/CAL:MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE, DUE PROCESS CLAIM HEARING, & TO SET TRIAL/DAWT/X:ALSO APPEARING FROM THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (CCSF),  OFFICEOF THE CITY ATTORNEY OFFICE, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY:YVONNE MERE, JILL CANNON,AND JENNIFER CHOI/X:DEFENDANT'S DUE PROCESS CLAIMS ARGUED AND SUBMITTED//X:DUE PROCESS CLAIMS DENIED, INJUNCTION IS LAWFUL,/X:PEOPLE'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ARGUED AND SUBMITTED/MO GRTD/CONTD TO SET OR DISPO, /CONTD:TO SET TRIAL OR DISPOSE/X:DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE IS WAIVED IF IT IS TO SET TRIAL, THE COURT  ORDERS DEFENDANT PRESENT THROUGH COUNSEL IF THERE IS A DISPO,
/CAL:STATUS CONFERENCE/DAWT/X:COUNSEL NOT PRESENT,/X:PER EMAIL OF 12-05-12 BETWEEN COURT AND COUNSEL, CASE CONTINUED TO 12-21-12 FOR STATUS CONFERENCE,/CONT/DAWF/
/CAL:STATUS CONFERENCE/DAWT/X:CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE IS ALSO PRESENT, COUNSELS YVONNE MERE AND MICHAELWEISS, AND PARALEGAL CAROLINA REYES-OUK/CONTD:STATUS CONFERENCE/DAWF/
/CAL:DUE PROCESS EVIDENTIARY HRG/DAWT/X:ADA CHRISTOPHER ULRICH ALSO PRESENT/X:COURT RECEIVED STAY FROM COURT OF APPEAL ISSUED AT 5:00PM, 09-27-12//CONTD:STATUS CONFERENCE/DAWF/

/CAL:SCOPE OF DUE PROCESS CLAIM/DAWT/X:DEFENSE TO FILE STATEMENT OF DEFENSE BY CLOSE OF BUSINESS DAY, 5:00PM, 08-31-12,/X:PEOPLE TO FILE OPPOSITIONBY CLOSE OF BUSINESS DAY, 5:00PM, 09-14-12,/CONTD:DUE PROCESS EVIDENTIARYHEARING/

/CAL:FURTHER HEARING ON DEMURRER/DAWT/X:THE COURT ADVISED ALL PARTIES, THROUGH COUNSEL, THAT ALL CASES WERE ASSIGNED TO DEPT 14, HONORABLE JEFFREY S, ROSS, FOR ALL PURPOSES, INCLUDING PRETRIAL CONFERENCES AND TRIAL,ALL COUNSEL, ON BEHALF OF THEIR CLIENTS, STIPULATED THAT COPIES OF THE COURT'S ORDERS MAY BE SERVED BY EMAIL, RATHER THAN PAPER COPIES,THE COURT OVERRULED THEDEMURRERS IN EACH OF THE CASES AND STATED THAT IT WOULD FILE WRITTEN ORDERS IN EVERY CASE STATING THE REASONS FOR THE RULINGS,ALL COUNSEL STIPULATEDON BEHLAF OF THEIR CLIENTS THAT THE TRIAL COURT'S HEARING ON THE DEFENDANTS' DUE PROCESS CLAIMS WILL BE CONDUCTED BEFORE THE JURY FOR EACH CASE IS EMPANELLED AND THAT THE COURT'S RULINGS WILL APPLY AS IF THE HEARING WERE CONDUCTED AFTER THE JURY FOR EACH CASE HAD BEEN SWORN,BY STIPULATION AMONG ALLCOUNSEL, THE COURT CONTINUED THE HEARING ON THE PEOPLE'S MOTIONS TO JOIN DEFENDANTS AND OR CASES TO A DATE TO BE DETERMINED AFTER THE PRETRIAL CONFERENCES,AT THE HEARING ON MAY 31, 2012 ALL DEFENDANTS WERE ORDERED PRESENT ONTHURSDAY, JUNE 21, 2012, FOR PRETRIAL CONFERENCES IN EACH CASE,  TO FACILIATE THOSE CONFERENCES THE DEFENDANTS WERE ORDERED PRESENT ON JUNE 21, 2012 AT THEFOLLOWING TIMES:8:30AM E FLOYD, V FLOYD, GAINES, WARE; 9:00AM BARRERA;9:45AM POWELL, LAKE,BROOKS AND 10:15AM PELLETTE, SMITH, WILSON, MITCHELL,FOR THOSE CASES WHICH DO NOT RESOLVE, THE COURT WILL CONDUCT HEARINGS ON THEDUE PROCESS ISSUES,  COUNSEL SHALL FILE BRIEFS TO ADDRESS THE SCOPE OF THEDUE PROCESS HEARING AND THE ISSUES TO BE DECIDED ON THE FOLLOWING SCHDULE:PEOPLE'S BRIEF = FRIDAY, 07-13-12 AND DEFENDANTS' BRIEF(S) FRIDAY 07-27-12,COURT DATE OF 06-21-12 STANDS,/
/CAL:TO FILE CORRECTED WAIVER OF CONFLICT & ARGUMENT ON DEMURRER/DAWT/X:CURRENT WAIVER IS NOT ADEQUATE, DEFENSE COUNSEL NEEDS TO FILE A CORRECTED ONE,/CONT/DOPC/

/CAL:TO SET DEMURRER AND FILING OF CORRECTED CONFLICTS WAIVER/X:DEMURRER FILED IN OPEN COURT,/X:CORRECTED CONFLICTS WAIVER HAS NOT BEEN FILED,/X:DATO FILE PAPERS IN RESPONSE TO DEMURRER BY 05-23-12, REPLY BY DEFENSE DUE BY 05-29-12,/CONTD:TO FILE CORRECTED CONFLICTS WAIVER AND ARGUMENTS ON DEMURRER/DEF:APPEARANCE WAIVED FOR FILING OF CORRECTED CONFLICTS WAIVER, ORDERED PRESENT FOR ARGUEMENTS ON DEMURRER/
/CAL:TO SET/X:DEFENSE FILES WAIVER OF DEFENSE COUNSEL'S POTENTIAL CONFLICTOF INTERESTIN OPEN COURT,/CONTD:TO SET DEMURRER AND FOR FILING OF CORRECTED WAIVER OF CONFLICTS/DAWF/

/CAL: 1043 EC (PITCHESS) MOTION/DAWT/X: ASHLEY WORSHAM, WITH THE S,F,P,D,LEGAL DEPT,, IS PRESENT IN COURT,/X: IN CAMERA HEARING CONDUCTED BY JUDGEBRADSTREET; RPTR R, FUNG, #4819, ARGUMENT IS SUBMITTED IN CAMERA,/MO GRTD/X:THE 1043 EC PITCHESS MOTION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED AS TO EXCESSIVE FORCE ON THE BASIS THAT NO POLICE REPORT WAS ATTACHED,/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/MO PC 1385:GUILTY PLEA TO OTHER CHARGE/BE/VD: DATE OF 09-16-13/
/CAL:TO SET TRIAL OR DISPO/DAWT/CONTD:JURY TRIAL/DOPC/
/CAL:STATUS CONFERENCE/DAWT/CONTD:MOTION FOR CONSOLIDATION, DUE PROCESS CLAIM HEARING/TO SET TRIAL/DAWF/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/CONTD:SCOPE OF DUE PROCESS CLAIM HEARING/DAWF/
/CAL:HEARING ON DEMURRER/CONTD:FURTHER HRG ON DEMURRER/DAWF/
/CAL:STATUS OF PITCHESS/CONTD:TO SET/DAWF/
/CAL:STATUS OF PTICHESS/CONT/DAWF/
/CAL: 1043EC (PITCHESS) MOTION/DAWT/X: ASHLEY WORTHAM, WITH THE S,F,P,D,LEGAL DEPT,, IS PRESENT IN COURT,/CONT/
/CAL:STATUS OF MOTIONS/DAWT/CONTD:STATUS OF PITCHESS/DAWF/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/CONTD:STATUS OF MOTIONS/DAWF/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/
